description_long: This object is a classic wooden violin, featuring a rich brown varnished body with a subtle wood grain texture. The front plate displays two elegant f-holes, a black fingerboard, and a light-colored tailpiece extending from the lower bout. The neck leads up to a scroll with four tuning pegs, and four strings run from the tailpiece, over the bridge, and up to the pegbox. The back of the violin is smoothly contoured and finished in the same brown wood, with no visible seams or ornamentation. The sides reveal the instrument's curved ribs and the slight arching of the top and back plates, while the chinrest is not visibly present.
description: A brown wooden violin with a glossy finish, visible f-holes, four strings, and a carved scroll at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the f-holes, fingerboard, tailpiece, and all four strings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the violin's curved body, neck, and scroll profile.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the smooth, unadorned wooden back plate and the neck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the body curvature and scroll, similar to view 1.
